channel.title: Environmental Intelligence
channel.description: Daily environmental regulatory, science, and compliance briefing for BC environmental professionals. Covering contaminated sites, remediation, environmental law, and climate policy.
channel.itunes:author: Environmental Intelligence
channel.itunes:summary: Daily environmental regulatory, science, and compliance briefing for BC environmental professionals. Covering contaminated sites, remediation, environmental law, and climate policy.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence - Episode 5 - February 23, 2026
item.description:
# Environmental Intelligence **Date:** February 23, 2026 🔬 **Environmental Intelligence** — BC Environmental Professional Briefing
**Executive Summary:** Nature Climate Change published a peer-reviewed article today outlining four avenues of similarity-based municipal partnerships for urban adaptation learning, emphasizing regional collaboration to address climate risks like sea-level rise and flooding. This provides actionable frameworks for BC professionals integrating climate adaptation into...
item.itunes:summary:
# Environmental Intelligence **Date:** February 23, 2026 🔬 **Environmental Intelligence** — BC Environmental Professional Briefing

This provides actionable frameworks for BC professionals integrating climate adaptation into...
item.itunes:title: Environmental Intelligence - Episode 5 - February 23, 2026

item.title: Environmental Intelligence - Episode 3 - February 19, 2026
item.description:
# Environmental Intelligence **Date:** February 19, 2026 🔬 **Environmental Intelligence** — BC Environmental Professional Briefing
**Executive Summary:** A lawsuit against the U.S. EPA for reversing its 2009 endangerment finding on greenhouse gases could signal broader challenges to climate regulations, potentially influencing international frameworks like the Paris Agreement that affect Canadian policy under CEPA. Meanwhile, a proposed Illinois bill aims to regulate data centers' energy and wa...
item.itunes:summary:

Meanwhile, a proposed Illinois bill aims to regulate data centers' energy and wa...
item.itunes:title: Environmental Intelligence - Episode 3 - February 19, 2026

item.title: Environmental Intelligence - Episode 1 - February 17, 2026
item.description:
# Environmental Intelligence **Date:** February 17, 2026 🔬 **Environmental Intelligence** — BC Environmental Professional Briefing
**Executive Summary:** A new report highlights how climate change may exacerbate ranavirus outbreaks in amphibian populations, drawing parallels to potential ecosystem disruptions in BC. This underscores the need for environmental professionals to integrate climate risk assessments into wildlife monitoring under the EMA and federal climate policies. While no direct ...
item.itunes:summary:

This underscores the need for environmental professionals to integrate climate risk assessments into wildlife monitoring under the EMA and federal climate policies. While no direct ...
item.itunes:title: Environmental Intelligence - Episode 1 - February 17, 2026

item.title: Environmental Intelligence - Episode 2 - February 18, 2026
item.description:
# Environmental Intelligence **Date:** February 18, 2026 🔬 **Environmental Intelligence** — BC Environmental Professional Briefing
**Executive Summary:** A Texas lawsuit against Dow Chemical highlights ongoing risks of wastewater non-compliance in chemical manufacturing, which could inform BC regulators under the Environmental Management Act (EMA) for similar industrial sites. Meanwhile, a global study reveals slowing species turnover in ecosystems despite accelerating climate change, signaling...
item.itunes:summary:

Meanwhile, a global study reveals slowing species turnover in ecosystems despite accelerating climate change, signaling...
item.itunes:title: Environmental Intelligence - Episode 2 - February 18, 2026

item.title: Environmental Intelligence - Episode 4 - February 20, 2026
item.description:
# Environmental Intelligence **Date:** February 20, 2026 🔬 **Environmental Intelligence** — BC Environmental Professional Briefing
**Executive Summary:** The BC government has expanded funding under the CleanBC Better Homes program, offering up to $800,000 per project for energy upgrades in social and non-profit housing to reduce emissions, directly impacting compliance with EMA Part 4 greenhouse gas reduction requirements. This creates opportunities for remediation engineers and consultants in...
item.itunes:summary:
